microui.core.base.ContentView

Description

  • Uses of ContentView in microui.component

    Subclasses of ContentView in microui.component
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Button
    Represents a clickable button component with text and/or image content.
    class 
    CheckBox
    A CheckBox component that represents a binary state (checked or unchecked).
    final class 
    Knob
    A circular knob control for selecting values within a range.
    final class 
    LabeledCheckBox
    A composite component that combines a CheckBox with a TextView to create a labeled checkbox.
    final class 
    MenuButton
    A hierarchical menu button component that can contain both plain items and sub-menus.
    class 
    Scroll
    A scrollbar component with a draggable thumb for selecting values within a range.
    class 
    Slider
    A slider component for selecting values within a linear range.
    final class 
    TextArea
    A multi-line text editing component with support for selection, scrolling, copy/paste, undo/redo, and keyboard navigation.
    final class 
    TextField
    A single-line text input field with support for text editing, selection, copy/paste, undo/redo, validation, and password masking.
    final class 
    TextView
    A component for displaying text with automatic resizing, alignment, and clipping options.

  • Uses of ContentView in microui.core

    Subclasses of ContentView in microui.core
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractButton
    Abstract base class for all button-like components in the microui framework.
    class 
    LinearRangeControl
    Abstract base class for linear range control components (sliders, scrollbars).
    class 
    RangeControl
    Abstract base class for range control components that allow selecting a numeric value within a specified range.

    Sets uniform margin on all sides.

    Sets horizontal and vertical margin symmetrically.
